exploration_notes:
Comprehensive analysis of the VS Code folding subsystem for implementing custom named folding regions with navigation.

**Core folding files (all must be read/modified):**
- `folding.ts` (1329 lines): Main FoldingController contribution, all folding actions (17 actions registered via `registerEditorAction`), and `FoldingAction<T>` base class. New `GoToNamedRegionAction` must be added here following the pattern of `GotoParentFoldAction` (line 1046). The action needs `IQuickInputService` injection
